name: Arctic Fox
ability: Each night, you gain the ability of an alive neighbor (you don't know which) until dusk.
flavor: Must your claws climb ten-thousand walls? You have come a very long way, sweet thing, but you do not belong here; you will not survive the week. I don't think they can climb ten-thousand more. (v1.3)
firstNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap their character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap their character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: An Arctic Fox with the Spy ability doesn't see the grimoire.
An Arctic Fox with the Widow ability doesn't see the grimoire.
